age_range.evidence: The depressed group indicates users who received a total of at least 21 scores and then the non-depressed group is up to 20 scores. ... The males aged between 19 and 38 (Mean=25.61, SD=3.72) and the 51 (24%) were females aged between 19 and 33 (Mean=24.06, SD=2.69).

fieldwork_year.evidence: Participants were gathered over two periods of time, April and December in 2013

gender_split.evidence: The males aged between 19 and 38 (Mean=25.61, SD=3.72) and the 51 (24%) were females aged between 19 and 33 (Mean=24.06, SD=2.69).
